query: SELECT c.id, c.contactName, c.contactPhone, c.teamMemberId, c.ghlCallId, c.batchDialerCallId, c.duration, c.recordingUrl, c.status, c.createdAt FROM calls c WHERE c.contactName IN ('Charles Lester', 'Russell Stansberry') ORDER BY c.contactPhone, c.createdAt DESC;
